words.def: fasten or secure with a rope, string, or cord
words.zh: v. 系（tie的過去式和過去分詞）
n. 日常飲食, 議會

words.def: neckwear consisting of a long narrow piece of material worn (mostly by men) under a collar and tied in knot at the front
words.zh: n. 帶子, 線, 鞋帶, 領帶, 領結, 關係, 束縛, 平局, 不分勝負

words.def: a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers
words.zh: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄滅, 漠然, 渴望
